item.name: Uyuy Xage
item.description:
As lethal as it is large, this monstrous scalekin calls the shallows of Bopo'uihih home.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: In the Hanuhanu tongue, this serpent's name translates to “large egg”─a reference to the scalekin's ever-watchful state as it protects its eggs during hatching season. The reckless few who have approached a nesting uyuy xage and survived the encounter do not recommend the experience.
